news.title: Gold Price: Yellow metal rate dips 19% from January peak, enters bear market - Is the 'safe-haven' myth cracking?
news.description: Gold Price: Several reasons are being cited behind the recent sell-off, including the ongoing conflict in West Asia and the strengthening of the dollar.

news.title: Gold back to bull | DB | Symmetric triangle
news.description: hi The gold is in DB in the Daily timeframe, once the neckline breaks the gold could reach the previous high. Meanwhile in the 4H symmetric triangle pattern is formed. After the breakout enter the trade. Most probably the market is expected to break upper side.

news.title: How Jim Cramer Advises Navigating the Macro Slide and His Take on 12 Stocks
news.description: In this article, we will look at how Jim Cramer advises navigating the macro slide and his take on 12 stocks. news.title: Paige DeSorbo says these $9 bracelets look 'really expensive'
news.description: 'I actually thought they looked really expensive,' she said of the style, which come in packs of just gold or silver, in addition to a mixed metal option.
